dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses 200-day SMA (sma_200) which is available. Entry on intraday penetration above MA is captured via crosses_above operator on close price. Exit conditions are dual: either 60-day hold period (hold_days_max: 60) OR price touches below 200-day MA (crosses_below condition). Target regime set to TRENDING_UP as the signal describes sustained appreciation in trending markets.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses 200-day SMA (sma_200) which is available. Entry on intraday penetration above MA is captured via crosses_above operator on close price. Exit conditions are dual: either 60-day hold period (hold_days_max: 60) OR price touches below 200-day MA (crosses_below condition). Target regime set to TRENDING_UP as the signal describes sustained appreciation in trending markets.

source_rule_text: A trader should initiate long positions when price penetrates above the 200-day moving average, as this condition generally leads to sustained appreciation over a multi-month holding period.
